title: Traefik HTTP Router Structure
description: JSON structure documentation for an HTTP Router object as returned by the Traefik REST API.

fields.name: name
fields.description: Router name in the format name@provider.

fields.name: rule
fields.description: Traefik routing rule expression (e.g., Host, PathPrefix, Headers).

fields.name: service
fields.description: Name of the backend service to route traffic to.

fields.name: entryPoints
fields.description: List of entry points this router listens on.

fields.name: middlewares
fields.description: Ordered list of middleware names applied to requests matching this router.

fields.name: priority
fields.description: Router priority. Higher values take precedence when multiple rules match.

fields.name: certResolver
fields.description: Name of the certificate resolver to use for ACME/Let's Encrypt.
